channel.title: INtravel
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Princess Cruises’ Captain’s Circle loyalty program: Everything you need to know
item.description: Princess offers a four-tier cruise loyalty program with a variety of perks. Here's everything you need to know.

item.title: How to transfer Chase Ultimate Rewards points to Aer Lingus AerClub
item.description: Aer Lingus AerClub Avios can be used to book flights to Dublin and beyond. Here's how to transfer your Ultimate Rewards points to Aer Lingus.

item.title: Why this is the most rewarding airline card for international travelers
item.description: The Atmos Rewards Summit card earns 3 points per dollar on every foreign purchase, an unmatched rate among airline cards. Here's why it belongs in you...

item.title: Bilt Rewards program: Earn points on housing, card benefits and more
item.description: How does Bilt Rewards work? Learn how to earn points on rent or mortgage payments, redeem for travel and fitness classes, earn elite status, and more.

item.title: The best credit card welcome bonuses of February 2026
item.description: Make sure these elevated and limited-time credit card offers are on your radar this month, or you could end up missing out.
